errors.popoverTrigger: PopoverTrigger must be used within a Popover.
errors.popoverContent: PopoverContent must be used within a Popover.

trading_session.title: Trading Session
trading_session.desc: Filter by trading session time (London, New York, etc.).

volatility_filter.title: Volatility Filter
volatility_filter.desc: Allows trading only at a certain level of volatility (ATR, BBW).

trend_filter.title: Trend Filter
trend_filter.desc: Identifies the presence of a trend using indicators like ADX.

senior_tf_confluence.title: Higher TF
senior_tf_confluence.desc: Checks for nested conditions on a higher timeframe.

btc_state_filter.title: BTC State
btc_state_filter.desc: Filter by the current state of the BTC market (trend, flat).

correlation.title: Correlation
correlation.desc: Checks the correlation of the instrument with BTC or another asset.

natr_filter.title: NATR Filter
natr_filter.desc: Filters trades based on the normalized ATR.

rel_vol_filter.title: Relative Volume
rel_vol_filter.desc: Filters trades based on relative volume.

tape_analysis.title: Tape Analysis
tape_analysis.desc: Detects acceleration in the trade tape (by volume or count). Provides data for comparison.

order_book_zone_condition.title: Order Book Zone Condition
order_book_zone_condition.desc: Analyzes order density in a specified order book zone.

level_proximity_condition.title: Level Proximity
level_proximity_condition.desc: Checks if the price is close to a local level.

order_book_zone.title: Order Book Zone
order_book_zone.desc: Analyzes order density in a specified order book zone. Provides data for comparison.

l2_microstructure_check.title: L2 Microstructure
l2_microstructure_check.desc: Analyzes events in the order book, such as large orders or spoofing.

local_level.title: Local Level
local_level.desc: Identifies local highs/lows on a given timeframe.
local_level.is_data_provider_label: Use as data provider (disable proximity check)

round_level.title: Round Level
round_level.desc: Checks the proximity of the price to a round price level.

trend_direction.title: Trend Direction
trend_direction.desc: Determines the trend by a combination of SMA and RSI.

classic_pattern.title: Classic Pattern
classic_pattern.desc: Recognizes candlestick patterns like engulfing, pin bar, etc.

volume_confirmation.title: Volume Confirmation
volume_confirmation.desc: Checks if the candle volume exceeds the average value.

price_consolidation.title: Consolidation
price_consolidation.desc: Determines if the price is in a narrow range (flat).
price_consolidation.text1: Price is consolidating for the last

open_interest.title: Open Interest
open_interest.desc: Analyzes the change or absolute value of open interest.

ma_cross_condition.title: MA Cross
ma_cross_condition.desc: Condition for the crossing of two moving averages.

rsi_condition.title: RSI Condition
rsi_condition.desc: Checks the RSI value (above/below a certain level).

value_comparison.title: Value Comparison
value_comparison.desc: Compares two dynamic values (indicators, prices, block results).

macd_condition.title: MACD Condition
macd_condition.desc: Checks for MACD line crosses or histogram value.

bollinger_bands_condition.title: Bollinger Bands
bollinger_bands_condition.desc: Checks the price position relative to Bollinger Bands.

stochastic_condition.title: Stochastic
stochastic_condition.desc: Checks for stochastic line crosses or their position.

price_vs_level.title: Price vs. Level
price_vs_level.desc: Compares the price with a dynamic level from another block.

and.title: AND
and.desc: Groups conditions. ALL nested conditions must be met.

or.title: OR
or.desc: Groups conditions. AT LEAST ONE nested condition must be met.

trailing_stop.title: Trailing Stop
trailing_stop.desc: Moves the stop-loss to follow the price and protect profit.
trailing_stop.text_2: and trail with an offset of

move_to_breakeven.title: Move to Breakeven
move_to_breakeven.desc: Moves the stop-loss to breakeven when a target is reached.
move_to_breakeven.text_1: Move to breakeven when price reaches

conditional_exit.title: Conditional Exit
conditional_exit.desc: Closes the position when specific conditions are met.

scale_in.title: Scale In
scale_in.desc: Adds to an open position when conditions are met.

conditional_management.title: Conditional Mngmt
conditional_management.desc: Applies actions (trailing stop, BE) if conditions are met.

modify_stop_loss.title: Modify Stop Loss
modify_stop_loss.desc: Modifies the stop-loss to a new dynamic value.

return_to_level.title: Return to Level
return_to_level.desc: Waits for the price to return to a previously identified level.

dca_management.title: DCA Management
dca_management.desc: Automatic position averaging via martingale or custom conditions.

grid_management.title: GRID Management
grid_management.desc: Place a grid of limit orders within a specified range.

tradingview_signal.title: TradingView Signal
tradingview_signal.desc: Awaits a TradingView webhook with a specific ID.

level_touch_analyzer.title: Level Touch Analyzer
level_touch_analyzer.desc: Precise touch, breakout, or retest of a level.

modify_take_profit.title: Modify Take Profit
modify_take_profit.desc: Move TP to a new price.

blocks.confirm_delete_block: Are you sure you want to delete this block?
